sections.paragraph:
κροκώδης, ες (κρόκος ‘saffron’±ώδης q.v. [s. Schwyzer I 418]; Diod S 2, 52, 5; Diosc. 1, 27; Heraclides [KDeichgräber, D. griech. Empirikerschule 1930, 195, 22]; Aretaeus p. 58, 24) saffron-yellow Hs 6, 1, 5.—DELG s.v. κρόκος.

q.v. q.v. = quod vide (which see, see that which has just been mentioned)

Schwyzer Schwyzer = ES., Griechische Grammatik—List 6

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

Diosc Diosc , or Dioscurides, I a.d. physician, also Ps.-Dioscorides after I a.d.—List 5

Aretaeus Aretaeus , II a.d.—List 5

Hs Hs = Similitudes

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 570
